{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154257C57A88439956A1F6D05B"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599744054160917272","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"——33章，故事很慢，当我流泪那一刻才意识到...我沉浸其中了。观看的时候是深夜，没由来的感觉到一股悲伤，或许真应了那句话：喜剧外表下是悲剧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769463798,"group_id":"7571099080693140505","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"绝赞学习中。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9JSEVSPlg+2sFdo/Cwh7eEaNfZ40hpns40DKgGJnnIE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b1d664b501d6455c862cbe2df8bf7625~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795856&x-signature=Uf%2F4NxvTAtsNLy0ObfOmppZuYq8%3D","user_id":"1390263023446172","user_name":"无情鸡蛋果有心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1390263023446172","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7571099080693140505","book_info":{"abstract":"【综穿+人物抽卡+主角到处乱窜+游戏、各种经典设定文、动漫+无CP】
被某个抽卡游戏抽中测试服资格，宁檬登录即发配。
而作为测试员，望着眼前的草原他当即决定对新手赠送崩铁的角色进行武力测试——不对，什么叫做我要和巡海游侠·波提欧来场属于牛仔的对决？什么叫做我被【记忆】星神瞥视了？什么叫做天外来敌但我测试完成该走了？
好好好，这么玩是吧？
我换世界去找其他角色测试去...等等这哨向文怎么和我知道的不一样啊？什么叫做白塔测试员必须配合哨兵行动？什么叫做我是污染源伪装的？
哈哈，毁灭吧。
——
（手游主星铁、第五，端游五花八门，定制文含修仙、星际（机甲）、哨向、娱乐圈等，动漫也五花八门。）
（PS：单纯想写点东西，但又不想局限在某一个设定，快穿又没办法搞同人，于是就有了这篇文。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5b22327a2ea6c49ca7e16f9cf6da7d9a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"迷白23","author_id":"","book_id":"7571099080693140505","book_name":"测试？不是说好的抽卡游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#605050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571099088280633881","read_count":"63","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"152164"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"72","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,卡牌,无女主,星际,娱乐圈,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5b22327a2ea6c49ca7e16f9cf6da7d9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435777&x-signature=PPJMPSxCHRvtspRwbzUnuPE
